Style.name: combo_style
Style.value: height="28" textcolor="#FF333435" itemvalign="vcenter" textpadding="4,1,28,1" normalimage="res='image/TwoWayFastTrade/combo.png' source='0,0,161,21' corner='2,2,28,2'"

Style.name: cwnumjine_mode_btn_style
Style.value: cursor="hand" textcolor="#FF000000" textpadding="2,2,2,2" bkcolor="#FFFFFFFF" hotbkcolor="#FF33ABEE" pushedbkcolor="#FF3E93E2" width="40" height="28" bordersize="1,1,1,1" bordercolor="#FFBDCEE2"

Style.name: radio_style
Style.value: style="option_style" height="17" stateimage="res='image/TwoWayFastTrade/radio_normal.png' dest='0,0,17,17'" statecount="2" selectedstateimage="res='image/TwoWayFastTrade/radio_selected.png' dest='0,0,17,17'" selectedstatecount="2"

Default.name: VScrollBarBlack
Default.value: width="5" showbutton1="false" showbutton2="false" thumbnormalimage="file='dui_skin/image/TwoWayFastTrade/vscrollbarbk_white.png'" thumbhotimage="file='dui_skin/image/TwoWayFastTrade/vscrollbarbk_white.png'" thumbpushedimage="file='dui_skin/image/TwoWayFastTrade/vscrollbarbk_white.png'" railnormalimage="" railhotimage="" railpushedimage="" raildisabledimage="" bknormalimage="file='dui_skin/image/TwoWayFastTrade/vscrollbarbk.png'" bkhotimage="" bkpushedimage="" bkdisabledimage=""
